proposal_text:
Title: A Quiet Descent
Concept: What if your perfect life was a perfect lie?
Website Product Description: Step into a beautifully crafted life where every day feels routine, every relationship familiar. You’ll manage your home, nurture friendships, and build the life you've always dreamed of. But slowly, almost imperceptibly, a chilling 'subtle wrongness' begins to creep in. A forgotten conversation, a distorted reflection, a disturbing detail in a familiar scene – these aren't cheap scares, but calculated cracks in the fabric of your reality.

This isn't just a game; it's a deep psychological journey where profound dread builds not from monsters, but from the unsettling realization that your entire existence might be a meticulously constructed illusion. Through intuitive choices and narrative puzzles, you'll piece together fragmented memories and confront disturbing truths about your own past and the world you inhabit. Can you withstand the unraveling, or will the existential unease consume you entirely? Prepare for a unique horror experience that stays with you long after you've stopped playing.

Title: Apex City: Awakened
Concept: The city is alive. Will you save its soul, or be consumed by its will?
Website Product Description: Prepare to enter Apex City, a vibrant, sprawling metropolis unlike any you've seen before—because this city is alive. It thinks, it feels, and it has a will of its own. As a burgeoning hero, you are called to its streets, discovering that your actions don't just impact its citizens, but resonate directly with the city's very soul. Apex City will either be your greatest ally or your most formidable foe. Perform heroic deeds, and the city might reward you with incredible powers, altering its architecture to create pathways or manifest helpful abilities. Fail, or betray its trust, and you'll face its wrath as streets twist into traps, buildings rise as sentient obstacles, and the urban landscape itself becomes a battlefield. Every choice you make, every fight you win or lose, shapes the city's personality and destiny. Can you master its intricate pulse, protect its living heart, and become the true guardian of a sentient world, or will Apex City ultimately consume those who fail to understand its awakened might?
